description_long: This is a pair of low-top, black athletic shoes with white laces and white soles. The shoes have a smooth, synthetic or leather-like upper with a subtle matte finish, and the laces are arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern through metal or reinforced eyelets. The toe caps are rounded and the heel counters are slightly raised for support. The soles are thick and appear to be made of rubber, providing cushioning and grip, though the tread pattern is not visible. The shoes are symmetrical and designed for everyday urban use, such as walking or casual activities. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A pair of black low-top athletic shoes with white laces and white rubber soles, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe caps, white laces in a criss-cross pattern, and the white soles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth black upper, the low-top profile, and the white sole extending from toe to heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slightly raised heel counters and the back of the white soles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the shoes with the same features.
